text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Today I w-won't be following from behind
anymore.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
I've admired Opera O for so long. And with your
gracious help, Trainer, I'm finally here!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Hear ye, hear ye! Allow me to make an
introduction, for at this Takarazuka Kinen, a
knight will be stationed by my side.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: She is here! Come hither, Meisho Doto!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Y-yes, I'm coming!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
While nervous, her footsteps are nothing light.
Firm and assured, step after step, she makes her
way over...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: She shakes while standing beside T.M. Opera O.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
(I'll become Opera O's support, and we'll run
together. Now, and forever...)

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
(If I get this right, I know I'll shine bright, just like
Opera O!)

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
(And if I do shine... just maybe, I'll have a chance
against the Ultimate Generation...)

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Doto, you've done well to come this far.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
I've been waiting for you, ever since that autumn
day—an affair dating back to last year, now six
months past.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Huh? Fall... last year? What... happened?

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Dear me, has it escaped your memory? It was the
day Ayabe took her leave from racing.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Be well, Ayabe. I am certain that for you, this is
but a small obstacle in a greater path. However...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
This means our fight with the generation
prior—the Ultimate Generation—will take a turn
for the worse.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
With our valiant trio whittled down to two, I can
only imagine my foes will have me surrounded.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
But alas, this is fate. All we can do is wait, I
suppose.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Ohhhh... So... what you've been waiting for is...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
An awakening. The long-awaited arrival of a
certain heroine before me.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Opera O... Opera... O!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: I understand! Please, watch me as I run!
